
```{python}
#| include: false

import os
import re
from pathlib import Path

import yaml


def _get_front_matter(qmd_path: Path) -> dict:
    with open(qmd_path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        content = f.read()
    m = re.match(r"^---\s*\n(.*?)\n---\s*\n", content, re.DOTALL)
    if not m:
        return {}
    return yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}


def _find_project_root(start: Path) -> Path:
    for parent in [start] + list(start.parents):
        if (parent / "_quarto.yml").exists():
            return parent
    return start.parent


FORMAT_KEYS = ("html", "pdf", "beamer")


def _extract_format_keys(fmt_block: dict) -> set[str]:
    return {k for k in FORMAT_KEYS if k in fmt_block}


def _auto_other_formats(doc_stem: str, current_fmt: str, declared_formats: set[str], site_url: str = "") -> list[dict]:
    if current_fmt == "html" and "pdf" in declared_formats:
        pdf_link = f"{site_url}/{doc_stem}.pdf" if site_url else f"/{doc_stem}.pdf"
        return [
            {
                "title": "Other Formats",
                "link": pdf_link,
                "content": "PDF",
                "content_class": "bi bi-file-pdf",
            }
        ]
    if current_fmt == "pdf":
        html_link = f"{site_url}/{doc_stem}.html" if site_url else f"/{doc_stem}.html"
        return [
            {
                "title": "Other Formats",
                "link": html_link,
                "content": "HTML",
            }
        ]
    return []


def _get_declared_formats(front: dict, project_root: Path) -> set[str]:
    fmt_block = front.get("format")
    if fmt_block and isinstance(fmt_block, dict):
        declared = _extract_format_keys(fmt_block)
        if declared:
            return declared
    for config_name in ("_quarto-website.yml", "_quarto.yml"):
        config_path = project_root / config_name
        if config_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(config_path) as f:
                    proj = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
                proj_fmt = proj.get("format")
                if proj_fmt and isinstance(proj_fmt, dict):
                    declared = _extract_format_keys(proj_fmt)
                    if declared:
                        return declared
            except Exception:
                pass
    return {"html"}


def _has_other_formats(items: list[dict]) -> bool:
    return any(item.get("title") == "Other Formats" for item in items)


def _project_llms_enabled(project_root: Path) -> bool:
    """Check the project-level master switch from quarto config.

    ``_quarto-website.yml`` → ``website.llms-txt`` must be ``true``
    for LLMs files to be generated.  ``_quarto.yml`` is the fallback
    if the website config does not exist.
    """
    for config_name in ("_quarto-website.yml", "_quarto.yml"):
        config_path = project_root / config_name
        if config_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(config_path) as f:
                    cfg = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
                val = cfg.get("website", {}).get("llms-txt")
                if val is not None:
                    return bool(val)
            except Exception:
                pass
    return False


def _build_title_meta_items(qmd_path: Path) -> dict:
    front = _get_front_matter(qmd_path)
    custom = globals().get('title_meta_items', {}) or {}
    auto_other = custom.get("other-formats", True)
    project_root = _find_project_root(qmd_path.parent.resolve())
    declared_formats = _get_declared_formats(front, project_root)
    try:
        rel = qmd_path.resolve().relative_to(project_root)
        doc_stem = str(rel.with_suffix(""))
    except ValueError:
        doc_stem = qmd_path.stem
    # Resolve llms-txt: master switch → per-document override
    show_llms = _project_llms_enabled(project_root)
    if show_llms:
        front_llms = custom.get("llms-txt")
        if front_llms is not None:
            show_llms = bool(front_llms)
    # Read site-url from quarto config for absolute links (avoids Quarto's
    # unresolved-link warning since .llms.md doesn't exist at render time)
    site_url = ""
    for config_name in ("_quarto-website.yml", "_quarto.yml"):
        config_path = project_root / config_name
        if config_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(config_path) as f:
                    cfg = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
                val = cfg.get("website", {}).get("site-url")
                if val:
                    site_url = val.rstrip("/")
                    break
            except Exception:
                pass
    result = {}
    for fmt in ("html", "pdf"):
        items = []
        for item in custom.get(fmt, []):
            entry = {
                "title": item.get("title", ""),
                "link": item.get("link", ""),
                "content": item.get("content", ""),
            }
            if item.get("icon"):
                entry["content_class"] = item["icon"]
            items.append(entry)
        if auto_other and not _has_other_formats(items):
            items.extend(_auto_other_formats(doc_stem, fmt, declared_formats, site_url))
        if show_llms and fmt == "html":
            llms_link = f"{site_url}/{doc_stem}.llms.md" if site_url else f"/{doc_stem}.llms.md"
            items.append({
                "title": "Other Formats",
                "link": llms_link,
                "content": "LLMs",
                "content_class": "bi bi-file-earmark-text",
            })
        result[fmt] = items
    return result


doc_dir = Path(os.environ["QUARTO_DOCUMENT_PATH"])
doc_file = os.environ["QUARTO_DOCUMENT_FILE"]
qmd_path = doc_dir / doc_file

# ----- Build title_meta_items for the title-meta grid -----
title_meta_items = _build_title_meta_items(qmd_path)
```

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.title-meta}

```{python}

items = title_meta_items['html']

from IPython.display import HTML, display

# Group items by title so shared headings (e.g., "Other Formats")
# appear once with their contents in a flex row.
grouped: dict = {}
for item in items:
    grouped.setdefault(item["title"], []).append(item)

html_output = '<div class="title-meta-grid">\n'
for title, group_items in grouped.items():
    html_output += f'  <div class="grid-item">\n'
    html_output += f'    <div class="title-meta-label quarto-title-meta-heading">{title}</div>\n'
    if len(group_items) == 1:
        item = group_items[0]
        html_output += f'    <div class="title-meta-contents"><p><a href="{item["link"]}" class="title-meta-content {item.get("content_class", "")}">{" " + item["content"]}</a></p></div>\n'
    else:
        html_output += f'    <div class="title-meta-contents title-meta-row">\n'
        for item in group_items:
            html_output += f'      <p class="title-meta-row-item"><a href="{item["link"]}" class="title-meta-content {item.get("content_class", "")}">{" " + item["content"]}</a></p>\n'
        html_output += f'    </div>\n'
    html_output += f'  </div>\n'
html_output += '</div>'
display(HTML(html_output))
```

:::

<style>
.title-meta-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  grid-column-gap: 1em;
}

.title-meta-label {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 0.8em;
  opacity: 0.8;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-right: 0.3em;
}

.title-meta-content {
  font-size: 0.7em;
}

.title-meta-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1em;
  align-items: center;
}
</style>
:::


::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}

```{python}
#| include: true

from IPython.display import Latex, display

items = title_meta_items['pdf']
latex_lines = []
latex_lines.append(r'\setlength{\tabcolsep}{10pt}')

col_spec = '@{} p{0.24\\textwidth} p{0.24\\textwidth} p{0.24\\textwidth} p{0.24\\textwidth} @{}'
latex_lines.append(r'\begin{tabular}{' + col_spec + '}')

for i in range(0, len(items), 4):
    row_cells = []
    for j in range(4):
        if i + j < len(items):
            item = items[i + j]
            cell = r'{\large ' + item['title'] + r'}\newline{\normalsize \texttt{\href{' + item['link'] + '}{' + item['content'] + '}}}'
        else:
            cell = ''
        row_cells.append(cell)
    row = '    ' + ' & '.join(row_cells) + r' \\[2em]'
    latex_lines.append(row)
latex_lines.append(r'\end{tabular}')

latex_output = '\n'.join(latex_lines)
display(Latex(latex_output))
```

:::
